_note: Disaster-recovery scenarios for the FRAMEWORK ITSELF (agent memory, andon pipeline, repo hygiene). recovery_script paths resolve to real engine scripts. last_measured_rta is 'untested' until a real drill is run — honest seed state, not a claim of tested recovery.

scenarios.title: Agent memory graph corruption or accidental loss
scenarios.impact: Self-improvement loops lose accumulated lessons/skills; retros no longer feed the engines.

scenarios.title: Pipeline stuck in andon-halt state
scenarios.impact: No new waves can dispatch until the halt is cleared.
scenarios.rpo_target: 0 (halt is pre-merge; no committed work lost)

scenarios.title: Capture a memory snapshot before a risky migration
scenarios.impact: Preventive: ensures DR-MEMORY-01 has a recent restore point.

scenarios.title: Secret or personal data leaked into git history before publish
scenarios.impact: Privacy/security breach on publish to a public remote.
